title: SONiC Exporter
description: Portable Grafana 10/11 dashboard for SONiC Exporter single-switch drilldown.

panels.title: Target Up
panels.description: Prometheus scrape reachability for the selected SONiC exporter target.

panels.title: Core Collector Success
panels.description: Always-registered SONiC collectors. Value 1 means the latest refresh succeeded.

panels.title: Default Optional Collector Success
panels.description: LLDP, VLAN, and LAG are env-gated but default enabled. Missing data can mean the collector was disabled.

panels.title: System Uptime
panels.description: Optional System collector uptime. No data is expected when SYSTEM_ENABLED=false.

panels.title: Collector Success Detail
panels.description: Compact table for core, default-enabled, and disabled-by-default SONiC collector health. Optional rows may be absent.

panels.title: Collector Scrape Duration
panels.description: Latest collector refresh duration. Includes core, default-enabled, and optional collectors; absent optional series are safe.

panels.title: Cache Age
panels.description: Cache freshness for cached collectors. Core interface/HW/CRM/queue collectors do not expose cache-age metrics.

panels.title: Skipped / Truncated / Stale
panels.description: Safeguard signals for skipped records, FDB truncation, and stale Docker source data. Zero is healthy; absent optional series are expected when disabled.

panels.title: System Version
panels.description: Optional System collector software/version metadata. No data is expected when SYSTEM_ENABLED=false.

panels.title: Interface Admin / Oper Status
panels.description: One row per interface status series. The `device` label identifies the SONiC port; values are 1 for up and 0 for down.

panels.title: Admin Down Interfaces
panels.description: Counts interfaces with admin status down for the selected switch.

panels.title: Oper Down Interfaces
panels.description: Counts interfaces with operational status down for the selected switch.

panels.title: Interface Inventory
panels.description: Metadata table only. This keeps `sonic_interface_info` out of dense time-series graphs.

panels.title: Top Interface Traffic
panels.description: Top-k ingress and egress interface traffic. Byte counters are converted to bits per second.

panels.title: Top Interface Packet Rates
panels.description: Packet counters are grouped by interface and method, then bounded with top-k.

panels.title: Top Interface Error Rates
panels.description: Receive and transmit error counters are grouped by interface and error type, then bounded with top-k.

panels.title: Transceiver Temperature
panels.description: Latest transceiver DOM temperature per interface, bounded to the warmest optics.

panels.title: Transceiver Voltage
panels.description: Latest transceiver DOM voltage per interface, bounded to top visible values.

panels.title: Optical Power TX / RX
panels.description: Transceiver optical receive and transmit power. The `unit` label is preserved in the legend.

panels.title: Top Queue Packet Rates
panels.description: Queue packet counters are grouped by interface and queue, then limited with top-k.

panels.title: Top Queue Byte Rates
panels.description: Queue byte counters are converted to bits per second and bounded with top-k.

panels.title: Top Queue Drop Rates
panels.description: Queue drops are high cardinality, so packet and byte drop counters are top-k bounded by interface and queue.

panels.title: Queue Shared Watermark Rate
panels.description: Shared watermark `_total` metric uses the Grafana rate interval and is bounded by top-k.

panels.title: Queue Watermark Detail Rate
panels.description: Detailed queue watermark series preserve `device`, `queue`, `type`, and `watermark` labels while top-k limits default rendering.

panels.title: Disk I/O Operations And Busy Time
LLDP Neighbors
panels.description: Neighbor count from the LLDP collector. No data can mean LLDP is disabled or the collector has not emitted yet.

panels.title: VLAN Member Counts
panels.description: One card per VLAN when VLAN metrics are present.

panels.title: LAG Member Counts
panels.description: One card per PortChannel when LAG metrics are present.

panels.title: LAG Members Up
panels.description: Sum of enabled LAG member interfaces. The table below shows each member.

panels.title: Entries Skipped
panels.description: Skipped entries explain invalid input, caps, or incomplete Redis data during the latest refresh.

panels.title: Cache Age
panels.description: Age of the cached LLDP, VLAN, and LAG collector refreshes. No data is expected when a collector is disabled.

panels.title: VLAN Admin Status
panels.description: Administrative state per VLAN.

panels.title: VLAN Oper Status
panels.description: Operational state per VLAN.

panels.title: LAG Admin Status
panels.description: Administrative state per PortChannel.

panels.title: LAG Oper Status
panels.description: Operational state per PortChannel.

panels.title: LLDP Neighbor Table
panels.description: High-label LLDP metadata stays in a table instead of dense time-series. Labels include local interface, local role, remote system, remote port, chassis, and management address when exported.

panels.title: VLAN Member Table
panels.description: VLAN membership table keyed by VLAN, member interface, and tagging mode.

panels.title: LAG Member Status Table
panels.description: Per-member PortChannel status. Value 1 means enabled and 0 means disabled.

panels.title: FDB Entries
panels.description: Total FDB entries from the disabled-by-default FDB collector.

panels.title: FDB Unknown VLAN
panels.description: Entries where the collector could not map the bridge VLAN ID.

panels.title: FDB Skipped Entries
panels.description: Entries skipped during the latest FDB refresh.

panels.title: FDB Truncated
panels.description: 1 means FDB collection reached its configured entry cap.

panels.title: Top FDB Ports
panels.description: Top per-port FDB counts. Limited with topk to keep the optional row readable.

panels.title: Top FDB VLANs
panels.description: Top per-VLAN FDB counts. Limited with topk because VLAN count can be high.

panels.title: FDB by Type
panels.description: FDB count split by exported entry type.

panels.title: FDB Cache and Scrape
panels.description: FDB collector cache age and refresh duration. No data is expected when FDB is disabled.

panels.title: System Identity
panels.description: Identity labels from Redis, read-only files, or allowlisted command fallback.

panels.title: System Software
panels.description: SONiC software metadata. Kept as a table so labels are not graphed as time series.

panels.title: System Uptime
panels.description: Switch uptime from the optional system collector.

panels.title: System Collector
panels.description: 1 means the latest optional system collector refresh succeeded.

panels.title: System Cache Age
panels.description: Age of the optional system collector cache.

panels.title: System Scrape Duration
panels.description: Duration of the latest optional system collector refresh.

panels.title: Docker Containers
panels.description: Container count from SONiC STATE_DB DOCKER_STATS entries.

panels.title: Docker Collector
panels.description: 1 means the latest optional Docker collector refresh succeeded.

panels.title: Docker Source Stale
panels.description: 1 means STATE_DB Docker source data is older than the configured threshold.

panels.title: Docker Source Age
panels.description: Age of DOCKER_STATS source data.

panels.title: Docker Container Info
panels.description: Container inventory table. The collector exports only the bounded container label.

panels.title: Top Docker CPU
panels.description: Top containers by CPU percent.

panels.title: Top Docker Memory
panels.description: Top container memory usage and exported memory limit.

panels.title: Top Docker Memory Percent
panels.description: Top containers by memory percent.

panels.title: Top Docker Network I/O Rate
panels.description: Container network receive and transmit rates, limited with topk.

panels.title: Top Docker Block I/O Rate
panels.description: Container block read and write rates, limited with topk.

panels.title: Docker Cache and Scrape
panels.description: Docker collector cache, scrape, and skipped-entry safeguards.

panels.title: FRR Collector Up
panels.description: Conservative FRR wrapper health by upstream collector. No peer or route detail metrics are included.

panels.title: FRR Healthy Collectors
panels.description: Count of FRR upstream collectors reporting up. No data is expected when FRR is disabled.
